integrated_features: event-type-aware CCF semantics for SNV/InDel, SV, WES-SV, RNA-only and CNV-derived events
optional external clonality and SVclone adapters
CLI ccf-2 extended options while preserving v0.4.1 APPM peptide modifier scoring input
run-demo and pipeline return CCF 2.1 sidecar paths
Nextflow CCF_2 module emits CCF 2.1 sidecars
notes: A --run-all attempt without sourcing conf/tools.env.sh failed only because external tools were absent from PATH; rerun after sourcing conf/tools.env.sh passed.
Project worktree contains many pre-existing unrelated modified/untracked files; this integration touched only v0.4.3 patch-related code, docs, tests and release packaging.
